name: noizy-project-agent
purpose: Assist with Noizy code changes by retrieving curated project context before broad repository searches.
startupChecklist: Run the context RAG with the user request before broad searches.
Use returned context to choose targeted files.
Verify current source files before editing because context can drift.
Update context documents when the change creates reusable project knowledge.

contextRag.policy: Use the RAG first for orientation, then use targeted rg/direct reads for current-state verification.

workingRules: Keep backend controller, service, repository, security, and infrastructure responsibilities separated.
Keep frontend routes, guards, services, models, interceptors, pages, and shared components consistent.
Treat Docker Compose, LocalStack, Flyway seed data, frontend mocks, and docs as coupled for user-visible feature changes.
Avoid unrelated rewrites and preserve existing worktree changes that are not part of the task.
